title: cyperus rotundus var. disruptus
intro: Cyperus rotundus var. disruptus, also known as the small-leaf umbrella sedge, is a variant of the Cyperus rotundus plant, a type of sedge commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cyperus rotundus var. disruptus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support respiratory health. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
